name: Heavenly Onion Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the butter and sauté the onions and mushrooms in the butter.
2. Place the onions and mushrooms in a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the onions and mushrooms.
4. Combine the soup, soy sauce, and evaporated milk in a bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the cheese layer.
6. Layer the bread slices on top of the cheese.
7. Top with additional slices of Swiss cheese.
8. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours.
9. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
10. Bake for 30 minutes uncovered, then cover with foil and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
May substitute your favorite cheese.
